text:
# In the High Court of Justice

In the [High Court of Justice, 	
Family Division] / [Family Court]

sitting at [Court name]	       Case No: [Case number]

[The Child Abduction and Custody Act 1985] /

[The 1996 Hague Convention on Jurisdiction, Applicable Law, Recognition, Enforcement and Co-operation in Respect of Parental Responsibility and Measures for the Protection of Children]

[Council Regulation 2201/2003)

[The Senior Courts Act 1981] /

[The Children Act 1989] /

[The Family Procedure Rules 2010 Practice Direction 6C]

(delete or adapt as appropriate)

The child[ren]

[Name of child]	[Girl] /	[Boy]		[dob dd/mm/yy]

[Name of child]	[Girl] /	[Boy]		[dob dd/mm/yy]

(Adapt as appropriate)

DISCLOSURE ORDER MADE BY [NAME OF JUDGE] ON [DATE] SITTING IN PRIVATE

The parties

The applicant is [applicant name], represented by [barrister/solicitor name] [instructed by [solicitor name and firm name] whose contact details are [ref, phone number and email]]

The respondent is [respondent name], represented by [barrister/solicitor name] [instructed by [solicitor name and firm name] whose contact details are [ref, phone number and email]]

(Specify any additional respondents)

(Specify if any adult party acts by a litigation friend)

(Specify if the children or any of them act by a children’s guardian)

Recitals

An application has been made by [applicant name] for a disclosure order against the [local authority].

The information is sought from [specify the local authority department].

The reason that such an order has been sought is [specify].

This order was made at a hearing without notice to the respondent. The reason why the order was made without notice to the respondent was [insert].

The judge read the following affidavits/witness statements [insert] and heard oral testimony from [name].
